theme: Premium Enterprise Black & Gold - Operator Console

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl tracking-tight font-heading font-medium text-text_primary
hierarchy.kpi_value: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-heading font-medium text-gold_primary tracking-tighter

typography.import_commands: Use Google Fonts for Playfair Display and Manrope.

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid #222226. Never use full transparency on surfaces that overlap content. Dropdowns, Modals, and Headers MUST have solid or heavily blurred semi-solid backgrounds.

buttons.primary: bg-gold_primary text-black font-semibold hover:bg-[#F3CE5A] transition-colors rounded-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-border text-text_primary hover:border-gold_primary transition-colors rounded-sm
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-text_secondary hover:text-text_primary hover:bg-elevated_surface transition-colors rounded-sm

cards.base: bg-surface border border-border rounded-lg p-6 overflow-hidden

inputs.base: bg-elevated_surface border border-border text-text_primary rounded-sm px-4 py-2 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-gold_primary focus:border-gold_primary outline-none transition-all placeholder-text_muted

kanban.column: bg-surface rounded-lg p-4 flex flex-col gap-3 h-full border border-border
kanban.item: bg-elevated_surface border border-border p-4 rounded-md cursor-grab hover:border-gold_primary/40 shadow-card

tables.header: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-text_muted pb-3 border-b border-border

timeline.dot: absolute -left-[5px] w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-gold_primary ring-4 ring-bg

grids_layouts.app_layout: Flex container with fixed Sidebar (w-64) and flex-1 main content area.
grids_layouts.sidebar: Fixed left, w-64, h-screen, bg-bg border-r border-border.
grids_layouts.top_nav: Sticky top-0, h-16, backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/80 border-b border-border, z-50. NO FULL TRANSPARENCY.
grids_layouts.dashboard_grid: Bento grid architecture. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6. Prioritize Z-pattern for summaries.
grids_layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. p-8 to p-12 for page wrappers. gap-6 to gap-8 between major sections.

motion.page_transition: Framer Motion: initial opacity 0, y 10 -> animate opacity 1, y 0, duration 0.4s ease-out.
motion.hover_micro: transition: all 0.2s ease. scale 1.02 on interactive cards, slight border color change.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA standards. Minimum text color #A1A1AA on #0F0F11.
accessibility.focus: All focusable elements must have focus:ring-1 focus:ring-gold_primary outline-none.
accessibility.testing: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='login-submit-btn'`, `data-testid='kpi-revenue'`).

media.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone or Regular weight). Do not use AI emojis.
media.charts: Recharts. Grid lines should be #222226. Tooltip bg #0F0F11, border #222226. Line/Bar colors #D4AF37.

3d_libraries_and_steps.libraries: Framer Motion for general UI interactions. Optional: lightweight Recharts for dashboard analytics.
3d_libraries_and_steps.steps: No heavy 3D required for this functional enterprise dashboard. Focus on high-performance 2D rendering and smooth framer-motion micro-interactions.

auth_background.description: Luxurious abstract gold lines on black, suitable for login page split-screen background.

abstract_data_placeholder.description: Digital interface showcasing futuristic graphs and data analytics in low light.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building GARUDA AI, a luxury AI Operating System module.
Use Tailwind CSS for styling. Implement the custom colors strictly mapping to the hex codes provided in 'colors'.
Create the specific modules listed: Auth, Dashboard, Opportunity Manager, Task Manager, Activity Timeline, Earnings, Analytics, Notifications, Settings.
Layout is a persistent left Sidebar + Top Nav.
CRITICAL: Do NOT use complete `transparent` background in header, overlays, dropdowns, or any surface that has content under it.
CRITICAL: You have .js files not .tsx file, so build components in .js or .jsx, and omit TypeScript type annotations.
No pure black text on dark themes. Use text_primary (#FAFAFA).
Never use `transition: all` globally. Specify `transition-colors`, `transition-transform` etc. per element.
Do NOT center-align the app container globally. Left-align text by default.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) where requested.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Always add transitions for specific properties excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. This disrupts natural reading flow.
Always use modern button styles (sharp or slightly rounded for this enterprise app) with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 for icons. Use Phosphor Icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Use `sonner` for toasts, located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.jsx or similar.
